explanation: I entered the applicant name to start the service journey.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
I selected email updates, which reveals the email field.
I entered an initial email address so the summary starts on the email branch.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to the check-answers page.
I followed the change link for the updates answer so I can remove the email branch from the summary.
I switched the updates answer to No, which should remove the email row from the final summary.
The branch changed, so I am returning to the review page to confirm the email row disappeared.
I followed the full-name change link so I can update a second answer from the review page.
I replaced the original name with the corrected value.
The updated name is entered, so I am moving back through the updates question.
The no-email branch is still correct, so I am returning to the review page to confirm both edits propagated.

action.summary: I made two edits from the check-answers flow and confirmed the final summary shows the new name and the no-email branch.

explanation: The summary now reflects both changes, so I am ending the task.
